name: Drunken Casserole Cake
recipeIngredient: Toasted, chopped almonds or toasted shredded coconut for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff and add 4 tablespoons sugar.
2. Beat egg yolks with remaining sugar and add to egg whites.
3. Fold in dry ingredients and melted butter and vanilla extract.
4. Pour mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and make holes in the top with an ice pick.
7. Pour sauce over warm cake.
8. Sauce: Boil sugar and water until soft ball stage. Remove from heat and add rum.
9. Pour sauce over cake, sprinkling with almonds or coconut before all liquid is absorbed.
NOTE: Good served warm or at room temperature the second day.
